---
title: "Gallery"
page-layout: full
lightbox: auto
title-block-banner: true
echo: false
body-classes: gallery-page
toc: false
---

## Fieldwork & Events

::: {.gallery-grid}

![Saba Fieldwork 1](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 1.JPG){group="gso"}
![GeoCongress 2025](Images/Gallery/GeoCongress2025.JPG){group="gso"}
![ASCE Maine Section](Images/Gallery/ASCE Maine Section.jpg){group="gso"}
![GeoCon Members photo 1](Images/Gallery/GeoCon Members photo 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![First Executive Board](Images/Gallery/First Executive Board.jpg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 2](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 2.jpeg){group="gso"}

![Graduation Social 1](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 1.JPEG){group="gso"}
![Andres Fieldwork 1](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 1.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Andres Fieldwork 2](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 2.jpg){group="gso"}
![Andres Fieldwork 3](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 3.jpg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 3](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 3.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 4](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 4.jpeg){group="gso"}

![Christmas Lights Social](Images/Gallery/Christmas Lights Social.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Babak Fieldwork 1](Images/Gallery/Babak Fieldwork 1.JPG){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 5](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 5.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 6](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 6.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Seaboard 1](Images/Gallery/Seaboard 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![BBQ Social 1](Images/Gallery/BBQ Social 1.jpg){group="gso"}

![Tufts 1](Images/Gallery/Tufts 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![BBQ Social 2](Images/Gallery/BBQ Social 2.jpg){group="gso"}
![Belal Fieldwork 1](Images/Gallery/Belal Fieldwork 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![Temi Fieldwork](Images/Gallery/Temi Fieldwork.jpg){group="gso"}
![Graduation Social 2](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 2.jpg){group="gso"}
![Graduation Social 3](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 3.jpg){group="gso"}

![Juan Sebastian Fieldwork](Images/Gallery/Juan Sebastian Fieldwork.jpg){group="gso"}
![End of The Year Social 1](Images/Gallery/End of The Year Social 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![Recruiter 1](Images/Gallery/Recruiter 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![Rakesh Fieldwork](Images/Gallery/Rakesh Fieldwork.jpg){group="gso"}
![GeoCon Members photo 2](Images/Gallery/GeoCon Members photo 2.jpg){group="gso"}

![Graduation Social 4](Images/Gallery/Graduation Social 4.jpg){group="gso"}
![GeoFrontiers Member 1](Images/Gallery/GeoFrontiers Member 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![GeoFrontiers Member 2](Images/Gallery/GeoFrontiers Member 2.jpg){group="gso"}
![Engineering Expo 1](Images/Gallery/Engineering Expo 1.jpg){group="gso"}
![Geolegends](Images/Gallery/Geolegends.jpg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 7](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 7.jpeg){group="gso"}

![Temi](Images/Gallery/Temi.jpg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 8](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 8.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Andres Fieldwork 6](Images/Gallery/Andres Fieldwork 6.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 9](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 9.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 10](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 10.jpeg){group="gso"}
![Saba Fieldwork 11](Images/Gallery/Saba Fieldwork 11.jpeg){group="gso"}


:::
